title: Find Median from Data Stream
problem_statement: Design a data structure that supports adding numbers and finding the median of all added numbers efficiently.
constraints: At most 10^5 calls will be made to addNum and findMedian.
intuition: Maintain two heaps to split the stream into lower and upper halves and compute median from the tops.

approaches.name: Two-heap median maintenance
approaches.description: Keep a max-heap for the lower half and a min-heap for the upper half, rebalance sizes after each insertion.
approaches.why_not: Sorting or maintaining a list is too slow for frequent updates; two heaps keep operations efficient.

interview_qa.a: To maintain the lower and upper halves separately so the median is quickly accessible.

interview_qa.q: How do you rebalance the heaps?
interview_qa.a: Move the top element from the larger heap to the smaller heap when their sizes differ by more than one.
